word: H6395 - פָּלָה - pâlâh - paw-law' - Put a difference

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּלה

Transliteration: pâlâh

Phonetic: paw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be distinct, marked out, be separated, be distinguished
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to be distinct, be separated, be distinguished
      2. to be wonderful
    2. (Hiphil) to make separate, set apart

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1772

Part(s) of speech: Verb
